name: xylo
description: Manage ads, Klaviyo, and approved TikTok Shop workflows from Codex with Xylo.

interface.shortDescription: Run ads, Klaviyo, and approved TikTok Shop workflows from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to Xylo's 300+ operations across Meta Ads, Google Ads, TikTok Ads, X Ads, Klaviyo, and approved TikTok Shop workflows, with an embedded safety playbook.
defaultPrompt: Audit my ad accounts and prioritize the biggest opportunities.
Show me the best and worst campaigns from the last 30 days.
Build a paused campaign from my brief and existing brand knowledge.
